description: Healthcare patient billing and payments platform. Improves patient financial experience through price transparency, flexible payment options, and AI-powered billing communications. Reduces bad debt for health systems.
business_model: B2B - Billing platform to health systems and physician groups
target_market: Health systems, hospitals, large physician practices
key_investors: Tiger Global, Andreessen Horowitz, Thrive Capital
competitive_advantage: Consumer-grade UX, improves patient collections by 20%+, reduces bad debt

varden_fit.rationale: Patient billing innovation - could integrate with occupational health billing
